summary: Production readiness testing for ManoProtect app. 22/23 backend tests passed (only /api/health 404 - endpoint doesn't exist). All critical frontend pages load correctly including Dashboard, Family Admin, Contacts, SOS Quick, Pricing, Health Profile, and Admin Users.

minor.notes: Not critical for production, but recommended to add for monitoring

issues: Date picker uses browser default format (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of Spanish format (dd/mm/yyyy)

action_items: Consider adding /api/health endpoint for production monitoring
Consider using Spanish date format in Health Profile date picker
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical APIs and pages tested for production readiness. Both superadmin and test user accounts work correctly. SOS features (Quick Button, Alert, Emergency) all functional. Admin panel accessible for admin users.

pages_tested./: Landing page loads correctly with logo, navigation, and promo banner
pages_tested./login: Login form works, redirects to dashboard on success
pages_tested./dashboard: Dashboard loads with stats, alerts, and navigation
pages_tested./family-admin: Family panel shows members, stats, SOS notifications, child tracking
pages_tested./contacts: Contacts page shows trusted contacts with add/delete functionality
pages_tested./sos-quick: SOS Quick Button page shows large SOS button with 'LLAMAR AL 112' option
pages_tested./sos-alert: SOS Alert received page shows alert details with confirm/call options
pages_tested./sos-emergency: SOS Emergency page shows active alert with cancel option and voice recording
pages_tested./pricing: Pricing page shows plans with 7-day free trial offer
pages_tested./health-profile: Health profile form with blood type, allergies, conditions
pages_tested./admin/users: Admin users panel shows user list with roles, plans, and management options

apis_tested.notes: Returns individual, family, and business plans
Login works for both superadmin and test user

production_readiness.recommendation: App is ready for production deployment. All critical features working correctly.
